examples.title: KNN Algorithm
examples.description: A simple implementation of the KNN algorithm
examples.code:
INPUT: data points, k
OUTPUT: predicted label

1. Calculate distances between data points
2. Find k nearest neighbors
3. Use their labels to make predictions
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the basic steps of the KNN algorithm.

examples.title: KNN Algorithm Implementation
examples.description: A Python implementation of the KNN algorithm using scikit-learn
examples.code:
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsClassifier

# Create a KNN classifier
knn = KNeighborsClassifier(n_neighbors=5)

# Train the classifier
knn.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Make predictions
y_pred = knn.predict(X_test)
examples.explanation: This code illustrates how to implement the KNN algorithm using scikit-learn in Python.
